text.title: Agency Discovery Call Playbook Failure Modes
text.summary: 3 antipatterns observed in real applications of this methodology. Each pairs symptom + root cause + concrete fix.

antipattern.symptom: Writeup leaves budget_range blank ('they will let us know').
antipattern.root-cause: BA does not ask the budget question directly.
antipattern.fix: Force budget_range min+max+currency; if lead refuses, set next_step=nurture instead of proposal.

antipattern.symptom: decision_maker is filled with the lead contact who admitted 'I need to check with my boss'.
antipattern.root-cause: Author treats the contact as the decision-maker by default.
antipattern.fix: Require explicit confirmation that the named person can sign; otherwise capture as influencer + escalate.

antipattern.root-cause: Author summarises without capturing direct language.
antipattern.fix: Require ≥1 verbatim quote per writeup; quotes drive the proposal narrative.
